name: ISO 9001
title: Quality Management
tagline: Your company with ordered processes that repeat without depending on a single person
description: The world's most widely adopted management standard. ISO 9001 allows you to standardize how you do things so the result is always the same, regardless of who is in charge.
who: Applies to any company in any sector and size that wants to organize its processes, grow without losing quality, and access tenders and corporate clients.
impact: Certified companies reduce operating costs by 15-25% and increase their customer retention rate by up to 40%. The certificate opens doors to contracts that were previously unattainable.

name: ISO 14001
title: Environmental Management
tagline: Reduce operating costs and open doors to tenders and markets with environmental requirements
description: ISO 14001 establishes an environmental management system that identifies, controls and reduces your company's environmental impact in a systematic and measurable way.
who: Manufacturing industries, construction companies, logistics services, and any organization that wants to demonstrate environmental commitment to clients and regulators.
impact: Waste reduction of up to 30%, access to government tenders with environmental requirements, and differentiation from clients who prioritize responsible suppliers.

name: ISO 45001
title: Occupational Health and Safety
tagline: Fewer accidents, fewer fines, more productive workers and total regulatory compliance
description: The international standard for occupational health and safety management systems. Identifies hazards, assesses risks and implements controls that protect your team.
who: Companies with physical operations, manufacturing, construction, mining, logistics services, health — any sector where workers are exposed to risks.
impact: Reduction of workplace accidents by up to 60%, decrease in sick absences, lower insurance costs and elimination of penalties for regulatory non-compliance.

name: ISO/IEC 27001
title: Information Security
tagline: Protect your company's data and open technology markets that demand high security standards
description: The global standard for information security management systems. Protects your information assets through proven policies, controls and technologies.
who: Tech companies, fintechs, digital health, e-commerce, cloud service providers, and any organization that handles sensitive customer or partner data.
impact: Access to enterprise and government contracts, reduced risk of data breaches, international client trust and compliance with regulations such as GDPR and LGPD.

name: ISO 22000
title: Food Safety
tagline: Export food with confidence and access the most demanding markets in the world
description: ISO 22000 integrates HACCP principles with a comprehensive management system to ensure food safety throughout the food chain, from producer to consumer.
who: Food producers, processors, distributors, chain restaurants, food input suppliers and any company in the food supply chain.
impact: Ability to export to EU, US and Asian markets, reduction of product rejections and withdrawals, differentiation with international retailers and distributors.

name: ISO 13485
title: Medical Devices
tagline: Sell medical equipment and devices in global markets with the endorsement of the most demanding standard in the sector
description: The international standard specific to the design, manufacturing and distribution of medical devices. An essential requirement to access regulated markets such as the EU, US and Canada.
who: Medical device manufacturers, distributors, medical supply providers, in vitro diagnostic laboratories and medical technology companies.
impact: Authorization to sell in the EU (CE Mark), USA (FDA), access to high-complexity hospitals and clinics, and compliance with public health tender requirements.

name: ISO 50001
title: Energy Management
tagline: Reduce your energy consumption by up to 30% with a system that pays for itself
description: ISO 50001 establishes a framework for managing your organization's energy performance: measure, monitor, optimize and reduce consumption systematically.
who: High energy-consuming industries, retail chains, service companies, corporate buildings and any organization that wants to lower costs and meet sustainability commitments.
impact: Energy consumption reduction between 15-30%, direct savings in operating costs, improved carbon footprint and access to tax incentives for energy efficiency.

name: ISO 22301
title: Business Continuity
tagline: Operate through any crisis and win tenders that require demonstrated organizational resilience
description: ISO 22301 defines how your company identifies threats, prepares for them and maintains critical operations in the face of disruptions: cyberattacks, natural disasters, pandemics or supplier failures.
who: Banks and financial companies, tech companies, critical infrastructure, health companies, logistics and any organization whose interruption has high economic or social impact.
impact: Incident recovery time reduced by up to 70%, competitive advantage in tenders requiring BCP, trust from clients and strategic partners.

name: ISO/IEC 27701
title: Data Privacy
tagline: Demonstrably comply with GDPR and LGPD and win the trust of European and Brazilian clients
description: Extension of ISO 27001 specifically designed for the management of personally identifiable information (PII). The bridge between information security and privacy compliance.
who: Companies operating in the EU or Brazil, digital platforms, apps with registered users, companies that process client data and any organization subject to privacy regulations.
impact: Demonstrable GDPR and LGPD compliance, elimination of the risk of multi-million dollar fines, trust from European clients and positioning as a responsible data company.

name: ISO/IEC 42001
title: Artificial Intelligence Management
tagline: Use AI responsibly, transparently and in a way that builds trust with clients and regulators
description: The first international standard for AI management systems. Defines how organizations develop, deploy and govern artificial intelligence systems ethically and under control.
who: Tech companies that develop or use AI, fintechs, insurtech, healthtech, and any organization that wants to lead the responsible adoption of AI with clients and regulators.
impact: Positioning as a leader in responsible AI, access to contracts in regulated sectors, differentiation from competitors and early preparation for EU AI regulations.

name: ISO/IEC 17025
title: Testing and Calibration Laboratories
tagline: Internationally recognized laboratory results that open markets and contracts
description: The international standard for the technical competence of laboratories. Ensures that your testing and calibration results are reliable, traceable and accepted worldwide.
who: Clinical analysis laboratories, industrial quality control, environmental, food, materials laboratories and any entity that issues technical results with legal or commercial validity.
impact: International recognition of results via mutual recognition agreements (MRA), access to contracts with the pharmaceutical industry and regulators, and elimination of costly re-testing.
